race.comment: ARCTIC BRIGHT (8) led from a wide gate before being run over late over 1300m at Newcastle, jumping a $2.9 favourite. Had made good improvement at Canberra prior, and she exits from the inside barrier today. Should be close to peak fitness and is a value play. WISHFUL THINKER (2) is an improver from the Waterhouse-Bott stable, who disappointed first-up leading over 1200m on a heavy track at Kembla Grange. He'd impressed placing at Sale before the spell when second-up and is sure to have come on. The 1.5kg claim is handy, and the speedy gelding will give a big sight. FREDDIE BASSETT (1) resumed for the Archibald yard, and he was beaten just 1.6L over 2200m in the Geelong Classic when last seen. He has placed first-up over 1400m and has been close up in two metro trials. Has the ability, and it's just the question of readiness. The betting should tell. DAME DIVIDEND (9) has been disappointing but is fourth up and capable of better. SUN TO ME (5) next best.
